unit.note: Full shared/tests/ suite — 1985 passed, 11 skipped, 18 deselected, 0 failed. touches_shared_infra risk flag enforced the full run. New tests added in this iterate: 22 action-unit (security/secrets/ci + per-source-gated legacy migration + symmetric emit/resolve gate), 14 CLI subcommand + parity, 28 launch_payload schema round-trip (incl. parametrized across all 10 KNOWN_SOURCES), 26 owner_repo resolution matrix (12 valid + 8 invalid + drift-protection no-gh-api), 6 aggregator fence + loud-failure + control-char strip, 15 dismiss helper + sanitize_reason + promote-reason hardening. Total touched-module surface: 228 tests, all green.

integration.note: Integration-tests/ not relevant to this iterate (no cross-plugin contracts changed). Shared/tests/ covers the action-unit + schema + CLI surfaces empirically.

pgtap.note: No SQL/RLS changes — Python framework repo.

e2e.note: No web/Playwright surface — library/framework repo. CLI surface verified below.

surface_verification.runner: uv run --extra dev pytest shared/tests/test_github_triage.py shared/tests/test_github_triage_action_units.py shared/tests/test_github_api.py shared/tests/test_triage_storage.py shared/tests/test_triage_schema.py shared/tests/test_triage_launch_payload.py shared/tests/test_triage_aggregator.py shared/tests/test_triage_promote.py shared/tests/test_triage_cli.py -v --color=no
surface_verification.note: F0.5 cli surface — 228 tests driving the producer→file→consumer→CLI chain through real subprocess invocations + round-trips. Includes the per-source-gated legacy migration matrix, the secret-scanning whitelist hygiene boundary, the owner_repo resolution matrix, and the CLI parity contract with triage_promote.py. Exit 0, single attempt.

degraded.detail: Gemini returned status=success with feedback=null; OpenAI (GPT-5) returned 14 substantive findings (2 HIGH, 9 MEDIUM, 3 LOW). All HIGH+MEDIUM integrated into spec + miniplan + tests before build. Sufficient coverage — no rerun needed.
